headline: BlackRock DOJ Probe Tests Private Credit Valuations And Investor Confidence
summary: BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) is under a Department of Justice investigation into how it values assets in a private credit fund. The inquiry focuses on valuation practices that coincided with capped investor withdrawals and closer regulatory attention. The company is also expanding private lending partnerships while addressing questions around governance and controls. For you as an investor, this centers on BlackRock's large presence in asset management and its growing role in private credit...
